title: hadrangis bracteosa
intro: Hadrangis bracteosa is a type of flowering plant, native to the mountainous regions of the Himalayas, belonging to the family Annonaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Hadrangis bracteosa include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a natural antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Hadrangis bracteosa typically involve the use of its roots, leaves, and flowers to create infusions, decoctions, and powders for medicinal purposes.
